en.title: Feel the breeze during Weekend Bikedays
en.description: Nothing says summer vacations like a scenic ride on a car-free parkway.

fr.title: Feel the breeze during Weekend Bikedays
fr.description: Nothing says summer vacations like a scenic ride on a car-free parkway.

en.title: Wander through Mackenzie King Estate
en.description:
Mackenzie King Estate is the Capital’s OG cottage that takes you back in time.

Hop on our free NCC Shuttle for that window down, hair-in-the-wind vibe on your way there.

fr.title: Wander through Mackenzie King Estate
fr.description:
Mackenzie King Estate is the Capital’s OG cottage that takes you back in time.

Hop on our free NCC Shuttle for that window down, hair-in-the-wind vibe on your way there.

en.title: Take the plunge at the NCC River House
en.description: Cool off with a swim or warm up in the brand new sauna to get that relaxing spa-like treatment!

fr.title: Take the plunge at the NCC River House
fr.description: Cool off with a swim or warm up in the brand new sauna to get that relaxing spa-like treatment!

en.title: Cool down at Dow’s Lake
en.description: Nothing says cottage summer like a scenic lakeside dock. Dip your toes or take a swim and enjoy an ice cold drink by the water at our beer garden, now open even longer.

fr.title: Cool down at Dow’s Lake
fr.description: Nothing says cottage summer like a scenic lakeside dock. Dip your toes or take a swim and enjoy an ice cold drink by the water at our beer garden, now open even longer.

en.title: NEW! East Wharf Dock
en.description: This new dock offers a fresh perspective on the shoreline. If you look closely, you can see another new dock in front of the Canadian Museum of History. Why not wave to your fellow dock users on the other side?

fr.title: NEW! East Wharf Dock
fr.description: This new dock offers a fresh perspective on the shoreline. If you look closely, you can see another new dock in front of the Canadian Museum of History. Why not wave to your fellow dock users on the other side?

en.title: NEW! Canadian Museum of History Dock
en.description: Nothing beats sitting down and enjoying some Parliament views. If you squint, you’ll notice another dock emerged at East Wharf. Why not wave to your fellow dock users on the side?

fr.title: NEW! Canadian Museum of History Dock
fr.description: Nothing beats sitting down and enjoying some Parliament views. If you squint, you’ll notice another dock emerged at East Wharf. Why not wave to your fellow dock users on the side?

en.title: Make your own adventure on the water
en.description: Explore the shorelines your way: paddle at your pace or hop on an Ottawa River boat tour.

fr.title: Make your own adventure on the water
fr.description: Explore the shorelines your way: paddle at your pace or hop on an Ottawa River boat tour.

en.title: Take in the sunset... or sunrise at Kìwekì Point
en.description: Spend a moment at Kìwekì Point and take in the scenic river views. (some would say it’s the best lookout in the region, and we won’t argue)

fr.title: Take in the sunset... or sunrise at Kìwekì Point
fr.description: Spend a moment at Kìwekì Point and take in the scenic river views. (some would say it’s the best lookout in the region, and we won’t argue)

en.title: A vibrant place: Westboro Beach
en.description:
Treat yourself to a day full of activities at the recently renovated Westboro Beach. Go explore the new lookouts, playground, café and restaurant!

Top it off with some sunbathing by the beach. Life is better with your feet in the sand!

fr.title: A vibrant place: Westboro Beach
fr.description:
Treat yourself to a day full of activities at the recently renovated Westboro Beach. Go explore the new lookouts, playground, café and restaurant!

Top it off with some sunbathing by the beach. Life is better with your feet in the sand!

en.title: Gatineau Beaches: fun in the sun
en.description:
Wether you’re a fan of open water swimming, playing pick-up volleyball or just laying down on a towel, the Gatineau Beaches hit just right.

It’s never been easier to get that lakeside feeling.

fr.title: Gatineau Beaches: fun in the sun
fr.description:
Wether you’re a fan of open water swimming, playing pick-up volleyball or just laying down on a towel, the Gatineau Beaches hit just right.

en.title: Soak in patio season
en.description: Relax on a scenic patio with good food, fresh air and beautiful views.

fr.title: Soak in patio season
fr.description: Relax on a scenic patio with good food, fresh air and beautiful views.
